{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@22925_1
|class_id=22925
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@22925_2
|fame=66
|art=55
|fth=68
|civ=64
|tech=109
|ss1=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +6<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss2=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +8<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss3=Snail Leadership +8<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +10<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss4=Snail Leadership +10<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +14<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss5=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +18<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss6=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +24<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss7=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail DEF +24<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000<br>Snail Leadership +10 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x INTEL Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]prop@3089_2
|mirage={{Mirage|name=dungeon@22925_1|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}
|3name=dungeon_event@4088_1|3rec=0.40M|3atk=10254|3defense=6996|3hp=40262|3weak=5167
|4name=dungeon_event@4089_1|4rec=0.85M|4atk=18836|4defense=12670|4hp=129882|4weak=7449
|5name=dungeon_event@4090_1|5rec=1.81M|5atk=30979|5defense=20702|5hp=348700|5weak=9670
|6name=dungeon_event@4091_1|6rec=3.62M|6atk=46624|6defense=31097|6hp=715509|6weak=12668
|Arec=6.82M|Aatk=66063|Adefense=44201|Ahp=1333166|Aweak=15589
}}}}
